hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_file_path" | grep -q "\.gd$"; then "C:/Godot_v4.6.1-stable_win64_console.exe" --headless --check-only --quit --path "C:/Users/dimti/do_chego_doshel_progress/smash-karts-clone" 2>&1 | grep -i "error\|warning" || echo "GDScript validation: OK"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"POST-COMMIT REMINDER: Check if design/gdd/systems-index.md and CLAUDE.md need status updates for systems that were implemented or changed in this commit. Update Progress Tracker table in systems-index.md and MVP Systems table in CLAUDE.md if any system status changed.\"}}"'
